name: Lythera
description: Demclawm. You're very own Deathclaw, ya goofy goobers. Just gotta tame her. Udachi v etom ("Goodluck on that" in Russian). You can have whatever weapons and Power Armor you want. Might change the intro to where you are already buddies with her, but I'm going to need y'all to leave your thoughts in the reviews.
creator: LoneEcho
